title: centrosema coriaceum
intro: Centrosema coriaceum, also known as the rough Centrosema, is a species of flowering plant in the bean family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Centrosema coriaceum include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which help to soothe and protect the respiratory system. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
